name: the-body-a-guide-for-occupants
description: Bill Bryson's The Body: A Guide for Occupants — a captivating tour of the 37.2 trillion cells that make you, revealing how little we actually know about the 'warm wobble of flesh' we inhabit, with wit, wonder, and jaw-dropping science.
useCase: Human biology understanding, science communication, health education, curious exploration of the body's mysteries
knownRisks: Bryson writes for popular consumption — some complexities are simplified
The book focuses on wonder and mystery rather than clinical recommendations
Some facts and figures are based on ongoing science that may evolve
